overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Track your net worth, portfolio performance and the breakdown by type, sector and country.

assets.title: Assets
assets.description: Browse and manage all the holdings in your portfolio.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account preferences and base currency.

addAsset.title: Add Asset
addAsset.description: Add a new holding to your portfolio.

advisor.title: AI Advisor
advisor.description: Get AI-powered insights on your portfolio balance and risk.

scroll.title: Everything you need
scroll.subtitle: Track every asset, forecast tomorrow with AI, and watch your net worth climb, all from one beautiful dashboard.

features.title: Powerful under the hood
features.subtitle: Real-time data, AI forecasting, and bank-grade security, everything your portfolio needs.

aiPredictions.title: AI Predictions
aiPredictions.desc: Time-series forecasts powered by Amazon Chronos to anticipate where your assets are heading.

multiCurrency.title: Multi-Currency
multiCurrency.desc: Track your net worth in your preferred currency with automatic conversion rates.

realTime.title: Real-time Data
realTime.desc: Live market quotes from Yahoo Finance keep every valuation up to the second.

tracking.title: Portfolio Tracking
tracking.desc: All your assets in one place, with net worth and allocation broken down in real time.

security.title: Bank-grade Security
security.desc: Encrypted sessions and modern authentication keep your financial data private by default.

dataSources.title: How the AI works and where the data comes from
dataSources.desc: NextWorth combines real-time market data with AI models. Here is the source of each piece.

prices.title: Prices
prices.desc: Live quotes and historical data for stocks, ETFs, funds, crypto and commodities.

fx.title: Currencies (FX)
fx.desc: Exchange rates used to convert every asset into your base currency.

advisorText.title: Advisor text
advisorText.desc: Generates the advisor's answers from your portfolio data. It may contain errors.

forecast.title: Forecasts
forecast.desc: A pre-trained (zero-shot) time-series model: it projects from Yahoo's real price history.

dataSources.disclaimer: This information is for guidance only and is not financial advice.

onboarding.title: Welcome to NextWorth
onboarding.subtitle: Let's set up your portfolio so you can track your net worth and get AI-powered insights.
onboarding.step1Desc: Stocks, ETFs, crypto, cash, savings or bonds. It only takes a minute.
onboarding.step2Title: Discover your projection and AI predictions
onboarding.step2Desc: See how your net worth evolves and where it could be headed.
onboarding.step3Desc: Get a breakdown of your portfolio and personalized insights.

dup.body: Choose how to apply this entry to your existing position.
dup.addDesc: Sums the quantity and recalculates the average buy price.
dup.replaceDesc: Overwrites the existing quantity and price with these values.

presets: What profile should I aim for?
How do I rebalance toward a more conservative profile?
chat.intro: Ask about how your portfolio is balanced and your risk profile. I explain, I don't recommend what to buy or sell.
chat.disclaimer: General educational information, not personalized financial advice.
chat.aiDisclaimer: AI-generated responses (Google Gemini). May be inaccurate; not financial advice.

explain.label: My risk
explain.prompt: Explain my risk profile and what determines it.

explain.label: My diversification
explain.prompt: Explain how diversified my portfolio is.

explain.label: Interpret my portfolio
explain.prompt: How should I interpret my portfolio overall?

insights.title: What I notice
insights.balancedFallback: Your portfolio looks reasonably balanced. Ask the advisor for a deeper look.

insight.concentrationHolding: High concentration: {pct}% of your portfolio is a single holding ({name}).
insight.noDefensive: No defensive buffer: little or no bonds, cash or gold to cushion downturns.
insight.cashDrag: High cash allocation: {pct}% is in cash/savings, which can lose value to inflation.

errors.errorBody: Don't worry, your data is safe. You can try again, and if the problem persists come back in a moment.
errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: Update the name shown across the app.

password.title: Password
password.desc: Change your password. You'll need your current one.
password.updated: Password updated. Other sessions were signed out.

errors.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

currency.title: Currency Preferences
currency.label: Primary Currency
currency.desc: This is the currency in which your total net worth will be displayed.

language.title: Language
language.label: Interface language
language.desc: Choose the language used across the interface.

tae.definition: Annual Percentage Yield: the yearly return of a savings account taking compound interest into account.

coupon.definition: The periodic interest payment a bond pays you, usually expressed as a yearly amount.

dividendYield.definition: The yearly dividends a stock pays, shown as a percentage of its current price.

bondYield.definition: The annual return a bond gives you right now, based on its coupon and current price.

riskProfile.definition: How much your portfolio's value can swing up or down, based on the assets you hold.

diversification.definition: Spreading your money across different assets so that one bad investment doesn't hurt your whole portfolio.

netWorth.definition: The total current value of everything in your portfolio, added together.

momentum.definition: The recent price trend: whether it has gone up, down or stayed flat over the past few months.

volatility.definition: How much an asset's price swings. Higher volatility means a higher risk of sharp ups and downs.

assetSignal.title: Educational reading of this asset
assetSignal.desc: A descriptive reading of this asset based on its history. It is not a buy or sell recommendation.

fit.aligned: Its risk level matches your portfolio's {band} profile.
fit.above: It carries more risk than your portfolio's {band} profile; adding it would make it more aggressive.
fit.below: It carries less risk than your portfolio's {band} profile; adding it would make it more defensive.

assetSignal.disclaimer: Educational reading based on historical data. It does not guarantee future results and is not financial advice.
